---
title: "OPALX Overview"
description: "Architecture presentation tracing OPALX input parsing, element registration, particle creation, and tracking."
audience: developer
status: current
last-reviewed: "2026-07-22"
number-sections: false
---

[Return to the Presentations and Reports catalog](../../presentations-reports.html)

**Presentation date:** 2026-04-06  
**Kind:** Architecture overview

[Download the original overview presentation]({{< meta documents-base-url >}}/presentations/2026/features/2026-04-06-opalx-overview.pdf)

This one-page overview follows an OPALX simulation from parser-visible
prototype registration through input parsing, beamline assembly, sampler
setup, `PartBunch` construction, field-solver selection, and the
`ParallelTracker` loop. It also gives a recommended source-reading order for
developers approaching the codebase.

Use this presentation as an orientation map. The maintained
[Architecture](../../../developer-guide/architecture.html) page provides the
curated description, while the current source remains authoritative for class
and function details.
